description: A customer received the wrong product. A customer service rep needs to resolve the issue.

nodes.task_description: Log a new customer case for a 'shipping error'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new case in the CRM.

nodes.task_description: Arrange for the incorrect item to be picked up from the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent issues an RMA and schedules a pickup.

nodes.task_description: Create a new sales order for the correct item to be expedited to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates an expedited replacement order.
